title: Ability to lock item cards

posts.author: juan.pyco (Juan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Item cards are one of the simplest yet greatest features to improve navigation for end-users in column heavy boards. However, at this time is not possible to lock layout or deletion of item cards from Editors or Contributors.

In multi-user boards (as in 100+) user collaborating in a board this is problematic

What are you trying to achieve

Limit the ability to edit item cards to only Board Owners
